ab: Kusiyang, uniyan lla dra eraw kanta. uwa driya trima dra eraw!
ch: Kusiyang，家裡沒有米酒了，你去買米酒。
en: Kusiyang, our home is out of rice wine, please go and buy some.

ab: ullaya driya a sadalillan i sawka. aeman na tremima i!
ch: B:廚房裡還有一瓶，不用買吧！
en: There is still one bottle left in the kitchen, so there is no need to buy one!

ab: sangeut na sadalillan. uwa driya trima dra druwaya dalill.
ch: A:一瓶不夠，再去買兩瓶回來。
en: One bottle is not enough for me, go and buy two more back.

ab: tratrima ku dra eraw. menaniwan mu dra eraw?
ch: m:我要買米酒，你們有賣嗎？
en: I am looking for rice wine. Do you have any rice wine?

ab: ullaya a! tratrima yu dra munuma?
en: Yes! How many bottles do you need?

ab: tratrima ku dra druwaya dalill. aw tratrima ku driya dra salubukan dra beras.
ch: m:我要買兩瓶，還要買一包米。
en: I want two bottles and a pack of rice.

ab: ullaya kadrini na beras. kiyaami yu driya dra manay?
ch: w:米在這裡，你還需要什麼嗎?
en: Here is the rice, what else do you need?

ab: tratrima ku driya dra bitrenun. ullaya?
en: I want some eggs too, do you have some?

ab: niwananay lla peniya na bitrenun.
en: We are out of eggs.

ab: tratrima ku dra kiruwan.
en: I want to buy some clothes.

ab: maranger yu tremima kana kemudakuda na kiruwan?
en: What kind of clothes do you like?

ab: tratrima ku kana lliketri tu asell na kiruwan.
en: I want to buy the clothes with short sleeves.

ab: inaba idrini na midrarang?
en: How about this red one?

ab: ullaya driya a druma tu edad?
en: Do you have another color?

ab: ullaya driya a bulenan aw a tremangiya.
en: We have white and blue ones too.

ab: berayi ku dra saya kana tremangiya na kiruwan!
ch: m:請給我一件藍色的衣服。
en: Please give me the clothes in blue.

ab: Kusiyang, muka yu isuwa a garemay? muka yu merenarenadra?
ch: W:Kusiyang你剛剛去哪裡了？你去運動嗎？
en: Kusiyang, where have you been just now? Did you go exercising?

ab: adri a! muka ku pullanga kan emu na babayan tremimaa dra kulang.
en: No, I went grocery shopping for my grandma.

ab: a kemadri! piyawari yu an karaub? kuwarenang yu kanku muka mekana?
ch: W:這樣啊！你晚上有沒有空？要不要和我一起吃飯？
en: No wonder! Are you available at night? Would you like to have a meal with me?

ab: adri ku pakaauka! auka ku tremimaa dra kiruwan.
en: No, I want to buy some clothes.

ab: an kemadru i, kurenanga ku kanu muka i!
en: Then, I will go with you.

ab: inabayan! kiyumalla ku driya. munuma paisu idri na satenges na kulang?
ch: m:你好，請問這把菜多少錢？
en: Hello, how much is this bunch of vegetables?

ab: makabetraan paisu na satenges na kulang.
en: The vegetables are $20 for a bunch.

ab: munuma paisu idri na bunga?
en: How much are these sweet potatoes?

ab: makatelun paisu na satintin na bunga.
en: Thirty dollars for a pound.

ab: berayi ku dra druwaya tenges dra kulang aw dra satintin dra bunga.
ch: m:請給我兩把菜和一斤地瓜。
en: Please give me two bunches of vegetables and a pound of sweet potatoes.
